title: Unilever appoints Priyank Mangal as Regional Legal Counsel – North, East & Central Region
description: Unilever has appointed Priyank Mangal as the Regional Legal Counsel – North, East & Central Region.Mangal is a 2015 graduate of National Law University, Jodhpur.With over a decade of experience across both in-house roles and law firms, Mangal specialises in Litigation Management, compliance, contract negotiation, risk management, and intellectual property law.Mangal has been associated with Unilever since 2018, when he joined as a Legal Consultant.
